default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Realign the Vendr-GrowthX partnership strategy around a new product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The partnership's goal shifts from driving traffic to product listing pages to converting users into "Ruth," Vendr's new AI negotiation agent launching tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** GrowthX proposed an editorial-first approach, creating listicles and guides to quickly capture traffic and LLM citations, which is faster than programmatically updating 12k pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Term Length:** Vendr requested a 6-month term for the execution phase, citing the need to quickly validate the new strategy's impact. GrowthX's standard is 12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Direct Agent Marketing:** A secondary focus was added: creating content and potentially running paid ads to drive traffic directly to the `agent.vendr.com` domain.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot: From Listings to "Ruth"

  - [Vendr's new AI negotiation agent, "Ruth," launches tomorrow, shifting the partnership's focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Old Goal:** Drive traffic to product listing pages → generate price estimates.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**New Goal:** Drive traffic to `vendr.com` → convert users into engaged "Ruth" users.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Why:** "Ruth" provides richer purchase intent data (e.g., product scope, user count) than the old price calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [**Monetization:** "Ruth" is free at launch but will have paid tiers, making user acquisition a top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Content Strategy: Editorial-First Approach

  - [Vendr's 12,000 product listing pages have shallow content, with only \~200 updated.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Recommendation:** Start with an editorial-first strategy, as it provides faster signals and avoids the high upfront cost of programmatically updating all pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**LLM Citations:** LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT) favor listicles and guides, which are easier to get cited than deep product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
      - [**Traffic Source:** Vendr's blog and buyer guides already have the most traffic and backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**Proposed Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
    1.  [Create net-new editorial content (listicles, comparisons, guides) to capture traffic and LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
    2.  [Use this content to cross-link to key product listing pages, building topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
    3.  [Postpone the programmatic update of all 12k pages until the editorial strategy is validated.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Scope & Term Length

  - [**Vendr's Request:** A 6-month term for the execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The 6-month term allows Vendr to quickly validate the new strategy's impact on "Ruth" conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Standard:** A 12-month term for execution, preceded by an 8-week strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Secondary Focus:** Develop a marketing strategy for the `agent.vendr.com` domain, including content and potentially paid ads.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Propose an editorial-first content strategy focused on driving traffic to "Ruth."](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [Confirm if a 6-month execution term is feasible and what it would require.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [Send content examples relevant to the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**Lucas Brown (Vendr):**](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
      - [Serve as the primary point of contact for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
      - [Coordinate internal resources (e.g., data access, product experts) as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/Wz9WUdtow9DfTB_N2Bunyy4tHvQpMtbe?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)

action_items.description: Email Lucas: sitemap best practices blog post
Email Lucas: editorial proposal (blog/buyer guides + agent.vendr.com); include examples + 6-mo term
